query:
You are working on the pinterest/ktlint repository.
The codebase is at version 0.49 (commit: c5ec2c6a).

## Issue to Resolve

Spacing around `..<` should be identical to spacing around `..`
Given code below with inconsistent spacing around `..<`:
```
@OptIn(ExperimentalStdlibApi::class)
fun foo(int: Int): String =
    when (int) {
        in 10..<20 -> "A"
        in 20..< 30 -> "B"
        in 30 ..< 40 -> "C"
        in 40 ..<50 -> "D"
        else -> "unknown"
    }
```

should be formatted as:
```
@OptIn(ExperimentalStdlibApi::class)
fun foo(int: Int): String =
    when (int) {
        in 10..<20 -> "A"
        in 20..<30 -> "B"
        in 30..<40 -> "C"
        in 40..<50 -> "D"
        else -> "unknown"
    }
```

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `ktlint-rule-engine-core/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/rule/engine/core/api/ElementType.kt`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundRangeOperatorRule.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

content.text:
Now I understand the issue better. The `..<` operator (range until) is a new operator in Kotlin that works similarly to `..` but excludes the end value. The current rule only handles the `RANGE` token type but doesn't handle the `RANGE_UNTIL` token type.

Let me check what token types are available in Kotlin's lexer:

content.text:
All tests pass. Let me provide a summary of the changes made to fix the issue:

## Summary of Changes

The issue was that the `SpacingAroundRangeOperatorRule` only handled the `..` range operator but not the newer `..<` (range until) operator. The fix involved:

### 1. Added `RANGE_UNTIL` to ElementType.kt files

**File:** `ktlint-rule-engine-core/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/rule/engine/core/api/ElementType.kt`
- Added: `public val RANGE_UNTIL: IElementType = KtTokens.RANGE_UNTIL`

**File:** `ktlint-core/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/core/ast/ElementType.kt`  
- Added: `public val RANGE_UNTIL: IElementType = KtTokens.RANGE_UNTIL` (for backward compatibility)

### 2. Updated SpacingAroundRangeOperatorRule.kt

**File:** `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundRangeOperatorRule.kt`
- Added import for `RANGE_UNTIL`
- Modified the condition from `if (node.elementType == RANGE)` to `if (node.elementType == RANGE || node.elementType == RANGE_UNTIL)`
- Updated error messages to use the actual operator text (`node.text`) instead of hardcoded `".."` so that violations report the correct operator (`..` or `..<`)

### 3. Added tests

**File:** `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/test/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/RangeUntilTest.kt` (new file)
- Added tests for the `..<` operator with various spacing issues in `when` expressions and `for` loops

The fix ensures that spacing around `..<` is now enforced identically to spacing around `..`:
- No spaces before or after the operator
- Both `10 ..< 20` and `10..< 20` will be corrected to `10..<20`
